github_owner.title: GitHub Owner
github_owner.description: GitHub user or organization that hosts the controlled vocabulary JSON.

github_repo.title: GitHub Repository
github_repo.description: Repository name that contains the controlled vocabulary JSON.

file_path.title: File Path
file_path.description: Path to the controlled vocabulary JSON inside the repository.

github_token.title: GitHub Token
github_token.description: Bearer token used for both subscribe and publish requests.
